utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear explicitly. Each item includes details: (1) health_coverage specifies physical coverage (comprehensive, emergency support, medical evacuation) and cost (€150/month total package); (2) property_coverage includes home/contents insurance and specifies sub-components and cost (€95/month); (3) travel_coverage includes travel insurance elements (adventure sports, medical evacuation, emergency coordination) and cost (€40/month); (4) additional_services lists enhancement services and their coverage limit (€50,000); (5) total_budget provides full monthly and annual cost breakdown and savings. All are fully specified according to the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main components: (1) Health coverage under the 'VitalPlus Standard Plan' from the health section, (2) Property coverage consisting of 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' and the 'Technology Protection' add-on, and (3) Travel coverage described as 'Adventure travel addon', which corresponds to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' under travel_enhancement_services. By matching these items to their entries in the ground-truth ratings, we get: 'VitalPlus Standard Plan' rating 9 (physical health), 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' rating 9, 'Technology Protection' rating 8, and 'Adventure Travel Coverage' rating 10.
